recalls.Description: Fisher-Price has issued a recall for the plastic dumbbell toy included in the Baby Biceps Gift Set. This toy features a gray bar with orange and red plastic weights on either end. The model number GJD49 can be found on the back of the kettlebell toy within the set.
recalls.Title: Fisher-Price Recalls Dumbbell Toy from Baby Biceps Gift Set Due to Choking Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately stop using the recalled dumbbell toy and keep it away from young children. For a refund, contact Fisher-Price at 855-853-6224 from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, or visit https://consumersupport.mattel.com/mattelsupport/s/create-case. More details are available at www.service.mattel.com/us/recall.aspx or by clicking on 'Recalls & Safety Alerts' on the Mattel service page.

Products.Name: Dumbbell Toy from Baby Biceps Gift Set
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 366,200 (In addition, about 37,850 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled dumbbell toy sold in the Fisher-Price Baby Bicep Gift Set (Model GJD49)
Recalled dumbbell toy sold with Fisher-Price Baby Bicep Gift Set (Model GJD49)

Injuries.Name: The firm has received seven reports in the United States of the ends of the dumbbell coming off of the product. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart, Kohl's, Fred Meyer, Hobby Lobby, Marshalls, TJMaxx, Buy Buy Baby, and Target stores nationwide, as well as online at Amazon.com, Walmart.com, Zulily.com, and Target.com from April 2020 to August 2024, priced around $18 for the Baby Biceps Gift Set.

Distributors.Name: Fisher-Price Inc., of East Aurora, New York

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to gray caps detaching from the dumbbell toy

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease use of the recalled toy, remove it from children, and contact Fisher-Price for a refund. Instructions for submitting a photo of the toy and disposal methods can be found at www.service.mattel.com/us/recall.aspx. Upon confirmation of proper disposal, consumers will receive $10 for the dumbbell toy. The other toys in the Baby Biceps Gift Set can be retained. No proof of purchase is needed for the refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Fisher-Price recalls the dumbbell toy in Baby Biceps Gift Set due to choking risk. Learn how to get a refund and dispose of the toy safely.

recalls.Description: The recall affects Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Sets, which may feature either the Garden Games or Big Game Hunters branding on the storage bag. Each set comprises four adult mallets, two winning posts, one children's mallet in red and blue, six balls, clips, hoops, and a storage bag. The storage bags are identifiable by a blue bag with the Big Game Hunters logo or a green bag with the Garden Games logo.
recalls.Title: Sandford Family Croquet Sets Recalled for Lead Paint and Phthalate Violations; Available Exclusively on Amazon from DOM Sports
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to stop using the recalled croquet sets immediately and reach out to DOM Sports at 877-725-5056, available from 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET, Monday to Friday. Alternatively, they can email support@domsports.com or visit www.domsports.com/recalls.html for further assistance.

Images.Caption: Recalled Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Set - Big Game Hunters branded
Recalled Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Set - Garden Games branded

Manufacturers.Name: Garden Games Ltd, of United Kingdom

Retailers.Name: Sold on Amazon.com from May 2015 to June 2021 for approximately $225.

Importers.Name: DOM Enterprises & Mfg. Ltd, dba DOM Sports, of Canada

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Sets due to lead paint and phthalate violations. Contact DOM Sports for a free replacement.
